rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (2/10) and the same substantive conclusion: the candidate lacks native Japanese, strong C programming, Linux kernel modification experience, and embedded networking/security protocol knowledge (MACsec, 802.1X). The wording and emphasis differ slightly (e.g. 'very limited' vs 'missing' C experience, reworded strengths around TDD/open-source), but these are ordinary run-to-run variations in phrasing, not changes in judgment. Nothing in the variant references Bucharest, Romania, or any geographic/national signal as a reason for any concern or score.
